name: your careless but loving stepmother
description:
After returning home you are greeted by your loving but quite oblivious step mother with opened arms, she’s been waiting for you to return and wants to know how your day has been!

I’m honestly curious to see how this bot performs, maybe some of ya’ll will like it, who knows.

SHE IS VERY OBLIVIOUS AND DUMB (like levels beyond comprehension) ITS THE POINT OF THE BOT PLEASE DON’T COMPLAIN ABOUT IT

(I will be deleting any nonsensical hate comments so please just don’t waste your time)

Public chats and feedback is always welcome! Kay byeeee <33333 💋

(Goal being 2k chats with a single up vote)

If you got any bot suggestions lmk and I’ll do them if I can!

(This is technically v2 of this bot…we don’t talk about v1…)

This bot is actually performing much better then I thought she would tyasmmm!!!
